heading: Support of Federal prisoners in non-Federal institutions
label: 12111 Support of Federal prisoners in non-Federal institutions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 13711 of Title 42

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Attorney General may make payments to States and units of local government for the purposes authorized in .section 4013 of title 18

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this part other than , there are authorized to be appropriated from amounts authorized under for each of fiscal years 1996 through 2000 such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section.section 12108(a)(2) of this titlesection 12108 of this title
